scenes.text: The court had cracks running through it like veins. We didn't care.
scenes.image_prompt: A cracked outdoor basketball court in a low-income neighborhood, golden afternoon light, weeds growing through concrete cracks, chain-link fence in background, nostalgic and raw, cinematic wide shot, 4k

scenes.text: We played until the streetlights came on and our moms started yelling from the balconies.
scenes.image_prompt: Silhouettes of teenage boys playing basketball at dusk, streetlights just turning on, apartment balconies visible in background, warm orange and purple sky, cinematic, golden hour, 4k

scenes.text: The backboard had no net, the lines were barely visible, and it didn't matter.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a rusty basketball hoop with no net against a dusky sky, paint peeling from the backboard, cinematic shallow depth of field, nostalgic mood, 4k

scenes.text: I drove past it last week. The hoops are gone. Weeds are coming through the concrete.
scenes.image_prompt: An abandoned basketball court overtaken by weeds and grass, empty pole where hoop used to be, overcast light, melancholic and lonely atmosphere, cinematic wide angle, 4k

scenes.text: But I swear I could still hear the ball bouncing if I closed my eyes long enough.
scenes.image_prompt: A lone basketball sitting on cracked concrete, soft golden light, long shadow stretching across the court, ghost-like motion blur of kids playing in the far background, deeply emotional, cinematic, 4k
